style_summary: A sparse orange-white-black flat illustration system with a white mascot figure, oversized prop, rough black dry-brush linework, orange cheek circles, and screen-printed paper grain.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main flat white mascot, face, hand, or simplified character
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: spinning, peeking, pulling, bracing, catching, blowing, balancing, pointing, or reacting
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: oversized basketball, camera, noodle bowl, kite, fan, record, umbrella, clock, flower, or other simple graphic prop
environment_variables.LOCATION: empty orange poster field or ultra-minimal graphic stage
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: paper grain, black motion ticks, white cutout burst, wind curl, sparse speed lines, or nothing
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: usually none; optional one short black hand-brushed word only when needed
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: usually none; optional tiny loose black side note
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: orange cheek circles, black dry-brush motion marks, rough circles, jagged white burst, or curved ear marks
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: white block face and hands, black rectangle shorts or body, no realistic clothing, no detailed wardrobe

prompt_template:
Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: style growth sample / poster illustration
Primary request: Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} image in the "Orange Brush Mascot Action Poster" style using Image 2 as style reference only.

Input images: Image 2: style reference for orange-white-black flat mascot illustration, rough dry-brush lines, oversized prop composition, screen-print grain.
Scene/backdrop: {LOCATION}.
Subject: {SUBJECT}.
Subject action: {SUBJECT_ACTION}.
Product or prop: {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}.
Background elements: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}.
Style/medium: minimal flat editorial illustration, rough black dry-brush ink, screen-printed paper texture, white mascot shapes on saturated orange.
Composition/framing: {ASPECT_RATIO}, tightly cropped poster frame, one giant prop overlapping the character, sparse negative space.
Lighting/mood: no realistic lighting, flat graphic contrast, playful and mischievous mood.
Color palette: saturated orange, paper white, carbon black, orange cheek circles only.
Text (verbatim): {MAIN_TEXT}; keep text absent if value is "none".
Secondary text: {SECONDARY_TEXT}; keep absent if value is "none".
Accent symbol: {ACCENT_SYMBOL}.
Wardrobe or visual styling: {WARDROBE_STYLE}.
Constraints: preserve the reference style but create a new case; do not copy the exact original scene; no logos; no watermark.
Avoid: watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, app UI, polished vector art, gradients, 3D, photorealism, realistic human anatomy, complex scenery, many colors, anime, corporate mascot, sticker-pack polish.
negative_prompt: watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, app UI, brand logo, polished vector icon, perfect clean line, gradients, 3D render, photorealism, realistic human face, glossy plastic mascot, plush toy, complex environment, dense props, many colors, neon palette, anime, manga screentone, corporate mascot, sticker sheet, decorative frame, readable UI text

values.SUBJECT: a white flat mascot figure with orange cheek circles
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: spinning a giant orange basketball on two fingers while squinting
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: oversized basketball drawn as a rough black dry-brush circle with loose panel lines
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: a few black motion ticks and sparse print speckles
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: black circular speed strokes and tiny orange cheek dots
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: white cartoon hand shapes, white round face, black rectangle shorts, no realistic clothing

values.SUBJECT: a white flat mascot face peeking from behind a huge camera
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: pressing the shutter while one eye disappears behind the lens
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: oversized black brush camera with a large circular lens and orange flash shape
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: one white flash cutout shape and rough black click marks
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: jagged white flash burst and dry-brush click ticks
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: white face, white fingers, black eyebrow marks, simple black lower block

values.SUBJECT: a white flat mascot figure leaning over a giant bowl
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: pulling one long noodle loop that becomes a swirling black line
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: oversized orange noodle bowl with black scratchy rim and white steam shape
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: black steam curls, white negative-space steam, sparse paper grain
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: black noodle spiral and small orange cheek circles
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: white rounded head, white hands, black closed eyes, black rectangle body

values.SUBJECT: a white flat mascot figure bracing against a pulled string
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: tugging a huge kite string with both hands, cheeks puffed
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: oversized white kite cutout with black brush frame lines
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: black wind curls, orange field, rough paper speckles
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: curled black wind marks and jagged white kite edge
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: white round head, white hands, black eyebrow slits, black shorts block
